creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #14)
> line 75?
> I didn't say it was great.

It's definitely there, but it just says the variable *exists*, not what it does. Last I remember hearing on the topic, it was decided that merely setting LICENSE was insufficient, because if any word was changed from the canonical license then we were violating terms by not distributing the provided license.

So my understanding was that, to comply with the terms of the licenses, the license had to be distributed with the packaged binary.
